title: Remove the legacy Windows installer
body:
### Feature request description

In 5.7 an new Podman Windows installer, supporting user-scope installations, has been introduced. But we are still building and publishing the old one.

This issue is about:

- removinig the legacy installer (the new one will be the only installer in v6.0)
- updating e2e tests (gvproxy is still copied in `%PROGRAMFILES%/RedHat` and there are some tests that are run against the legacy installer)
- updating the release github actions.
- updating [machine-os CI](https://github.com/containers/podman-machine-os/blob/main/contrib/cirrus/windows_setup.ps1)

This is not about running e2e tests as a non administrator, that is tracked in a [distinct issue](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/27597).
